instruction: Task: proofread and humanize. Input text: "I am reaching out to discuss the pivotal opportunity for collaboration, and I would be delighted to explore synergies with your team." Constraints: remove AI-sounding phrasing, avoid em dashes, keep it professional. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I removed inflated business jargon and replaced it with simpler, more natural wording while keeping the tone professional. I also avoided AI-sounding phrases and unnecessary polish.","final_text":"I’m reaching out to discuss a potential collaboration with your team. If it’s useful, I’d be glad to talk through what that could look like."}

instruction: Task: shorten and humanize. Input text: "This document aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the key considerations that should be taken into account before moving forward with the launch." Constraints: keep the meaning, make it concise, avoid stiff corporate tone. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I cut filler like 'aims to provide' and 'should be taken into account' to make the sentence shorter and more natural. The revision keeps the original meaning without the corporate padding.","final_text":"This document outlines the key points to review before the launch."}

instruction: Task: formalize without sounding robotic. Input text: "hey, just wanted to check if you had time to look at the draft yet" Constraints: professional, warm, human, no em dash. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I kept the message polite and warm while cleaning up capitalization and making the request sound more professional. I avoided overformal wording so it still reads like a person wrote it.","final_text":"Hi, I wanted to check whether you’ve had a chance to look at the draft yet."}

instruction: Task: summarize and humanize. Input text: "Our platform enables organizations to leverage advanced automation capabilities in order to streamline cross-functional workflows and unlock transformational efficiency gains." Constraints: one sentence, plain English, avoid hype. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I removed hype-heavy terms like 'leverage,' 'transformational,' and 'efficiency gains' and rewrote the sentence in plain English. The new version says what the product does without sounding inflated.","final_text":"Our platform helps teams automate shared workflows so work moves faster with less manual effort."}

instruction: Task: rewrite to sound more concise and human. Input text: "We are writing to inform you that your request has been received and is currently under review by the appropriate team." Constraints: clear, calm, natural, no em dash. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I cut formal filler and made the update sound more direct while keeping the tone calm and professional. The new version feels more like a real person wrote it.","final_text":"We received your request, and the right team is reviewing it now."}

instruction: Task: make this note more formal without making it stiff. Input text: "can you send me the latest numbers when you get a sec" Constraints: professional, natural, warm. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I corrected the casual phrasing and made the request more polished while keeping it friendly. The revision avoids sounding overly formal or cold.","final_text":"Could you send me the latest numbers when you have a moment?"}

instruction: Task: summarize and humanize. Input text: "The meeting focused on a variety of topics, including hiring, roadmap priorities, support issues, and internal coordination challenges that may affect timing." Constraints: one sentence, concise, plain English. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I compressed the list into a cleaner summary and replaced vague wording with simpler language. The sentence now reads faster without losing the main points.","final_text":"The meeting covered hiring, roadmap priorities, support issues, and coordination problems that could affect timing."}

instruction: Task: proofread and humanize. Input text: "Your feedback is greatly appreciated, and it will be instrumental in helping us move forward in a meaningful and impactful manner." Constraints: natural, grateful, no hype, no em dash. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I kept the gratitude but removed inflated phrases like 'instrumental' and 'meaningful and impactful.' The result sounds sincere instead of overdone.","final_text":"We appreciate your feedback, and it will help us move forward more clearly."}

instruction: Task: rewrite for clarity and human tone. Input text: "At this point in time, we do not currently have the capacity to prioritize this initiative within the present quarter." Constraints: direct, professional, natural. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I removed redundant phrases like 'at this point in time' and 'currently' to make the sentence more direct. The message stays professional but sounds more natural.","final_text":"We can’t prioritize this initiative this quarter."}

instruction: Task: shorten and formalize. Input text: "I just wanted to follow up again because I know things get busy, and I was hoping to see whether there had been any updates on the proposal." Constraints: concise, polite, human, no em dash. Output format: JSON with keys brief_rationale and final_text.
response: {"brief_rationale":"I tightened the sentence by removing repetition and filler while keeping the follow-up polite. The result is shorter and more professional without sounding robotic.","final_text":"I wanted to follow up and see whether there have been any updates on the proposal."}
